painirli-argiro.name: Painirli

ingredients.item: Water lukewarm as it takes (about 11⁄2 fl)
250 gr caseri grated (or in small frames)
2 tablespoons of cow butter melted (for finishing)
Water lukewarm as it takes (about 11⁄2 fl)
250 gr caseri grated (or in small frames)
2 tablespoons of cow butter melted (for finishing)

instructions: Add the flour to a bowl and add the butter.
Rub and drizzle the flour to wet from the butter.
Add the sugar, yeast and mix with a spoon.
Dissolve the salt in the water, add it to the flour and mix with the spoon until dough starts to form.
Instead of plain water we can add 1/2 water half milk lukewarm.
Place your hands on extra flour and knead. When the dough becomes soft, soft and supple, collect the compounds downwards and touch it in an oily bowl.
Cover the bowl and allow the dough to stand for at least 1 hour.
The dough must become double, fluffy and inflatable.
We prepare the materials for the filling.
If you want to make homemade tomato sauce.
We make the peinirli.
Divide the fluffy dough to 4.
Whenever necessary, dip your hands in the flour so that the dough does not stick.
Open each piece of dough with the hands or with the cook on a long sheet, as we make pizza.
We give the dough a barkula shape. We make the rest.
Leave them on floured cutting wood for 30 minutes, to rise again.
Preheat the evening at a high temperature at 200 to 220 °C in the resistors, we will make on the bottom grill.
Place a baking pan at the bottom of the oven to heat well for baking properly.
We fill every ham peinirli and lots of cheese.
In the filling you can put whatever you want, such as tomato, pastrami, ham, egg and whatever you like.
We touch the full peinirli on the hot pan.
Bake on the bottom grill of the oven for about 25 minutes until well golden.
Once they are removed from the oven hot as they are, brush them with melted good butter to polish and serve them warm.

pan-fried-tilapia.name: Pan-fried Tilapia

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Dry tilapia fillets and cut each in half. Season each fillet with Cajun seasoning, salt, and pepper. Dredge in flour to coat, shaking off excess.

Melt butter and oil in a large heavy skillet over medium-high heat. Pan-fry fish quickly, working in batches if needed, until edges appear white, 3 to 4 minutes. Flip and continue to cook until easily flaked with a fork, 3 to 4 minutes more. Remove to a plate and keep warm.

Heat the same pan over medium-high heat. Saute onion until soft, about 5 minutes. Pour white wine into the pan, reduce heat, and let simmer until reduced by about half, 5 to 7 minutes. Drizzle sauce over fish before serving and garnish with capers.

pancakes-of-argyros-argiro.name: Pancakes Of Argyros

ingredients.item: 1 cup of flour inflated by itself
1 cup of flour inflated by itself

instructions: In a bowl, add the flour, salt and water.
Mix well until a homogeneous porridge is formed and let it rest for 10-15 minutes.
Heat a pan and add olive oil until it covers the bottom, about 1⁄2 cm.
When the oil burns, add the porridge spoonful, creating small pancakes.
Fry until golden on one side and then turn them to brown on the other.
We take them out and touch them on kitchen paper to drain the excess oil.
Serve the pancakes on a platter and pour them with petimese or honey, or sprinkle them with cinnamon.
Enjoy the warm ones!

pasta.name: Pasta

ingredients.item: Plus 2 tablespoons fine durum wheat flour or all-purpose flour plus more for dusting
Fine durum wheat flour is available at natural foods stores and some specialty foods stores. semolina flour is available at italian markets
ingredients.prep: specialty foods stores, and some supermarkets.

instructions: Combine durum wheat flour and semolina flour in a large bowl. Bring a small saucepan of water to a bare simmer. Add ⅔ cup hot water to flours and mix with a fork until mixture just comes together. Turn out dough onto a surface lightly dusted with durum wheat flour and knead until smooth and elastic, 8–10 minutes (alternatively, using a stand mixer fitted with a dough hook, mix on low speed, about 5 minutes). Wrap tightly in plastic wrap; let sit 1 hour at room temperature.
Do Ahead: Pasta dough can be made 1 day ahead. Wrap tightly and chill.

pea-paste-lezzet.name: Pea Paste

ingredients.item: 2 kibrit kutusu parmesan veya herhangi bir sert peynir

instructions: 1. Pass all materials from the kitchen robot until well crushed and serve as you like.
2. If you like the tad, you can also prepare for gifts in cute jars.

peach-and-blueberry-pie.name: Peach And Blueberry Pie

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Zest and juice of 1 large lemon
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: room temperature, cut into small pieces

instructions: Whisk 1⅔ cups (208 g) all-purpose flour, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ¼ tsp. baking powder in a large bowl to combine. Add 2 oz. (56 g) chilled cream cheese, cut into 1" pieces, and rub into dry ingredients with your fingers until incorporated (mixture will look very shaggy). Add 10 Tbsp. (140 g) chilled unsalted butter, sliced ½" thick, and toss to coat in flour, then smash into smaller, flatter pieces (about chickpea-size).

Make a well in the center and pour in ¼ cup (60 g) ice water. Toss mixture with a fork or your hands to distribute, then knead in bowl a couple times to bring dough together (some dry bits may remain).

Turn out dough onto a surface lightly dusted with rice flour or all-purpose flour; dust top of dough with flour. Roll out to a ½"-thick rectangle. Fold dough in half, rotate 90°, and fold in half again. Roll out again to a ½"-thick rectangle and repeat folding process, dusting with more flour as needed to prevent sticking. Pat into a ½"-thick disk and wrap tightly in plastic. Chill at least 2 hours and, preferably, up to 12 hours.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 1 month ahead. Double wrap disk in plastic and freeze instead of chilling. Thaw overnight in refrigerator before using.

Combine zest and juice of 1 large lemon, 2¼ lb. barely ripe peaches (about 7 large), each cut into 8 wedges, 1 cup (200 g) granulated sugar, 3 Tbsp. unsalted butter, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. ground cardamom, and ¼ tsp. freshly grated nutmeg in large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally with a heatproof rubber spatula, until sugar is dissolved and peaches have softened slightly but still retain their shape and released a generous amount of liquid, 15–18 minutes. Using spatula, smash about half of the peaches into small pieces (about almond-size).

Stir ¼ cup cornstarch and 3 Tbsp. cool water in a small bowl until cornstarch is dissolved. Pour into peach mixture and cook, gently stirring often, until filling bubbles and thickens significantly, about 3 minutes. Transfer filling to a large bowl and stir in 8 oz. fresh blueberries; let cool. Cover with a lid or a large plate and chill until cold, at least 2 hours.
Do Ahead: Filling can be made 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.

Stir ½ cup (62 g) all-purpose flour, ¼ cup (packed; 50 g) dark brown sugar, 1 tsp. ground cardamom, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal kosher salt or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ⅛ tsp. baking powder in a small bowl to combine. Add 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, cut into small pieces, and rub butter into dry ingredients with your fingers until pea-size lumps form. Cover streusel and chill until ready to use.
Remove dough from refrigerator and let sit at room temperature 5 minutes.

Unwrap and roll out dough on a surface lightly dusted with rice flour or all-purpose flour to about a 12" round about ⅛" thick. Brush excess flour from dough and transfer to a 9"-diameter pie pan, preferably metal. Lift edges and allow dough to slump down into pan, then press dough firmly into bottom and sides. Trim, leaving about 1" overhang. Fold overhang under to make dough flush with edges of pan and press firmly to seal; crimp edges as desired. Prick bottom and sides of dough several times with a fork. Chill 15 minutes.

Place a rack in lower third of oven; preheat to 375°. Place crust on a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet. Crumple up 2 sheets of parchment paper, then unfold and use to line crust. Fill with pie weights or dried beans (they should fill to the edges). Bake crust until edges are golden brown and bottom is opaque (carefully lift parchment to check), 30–35 minutes. Remove from oven; reduce oven temperature to 350°. Lift out parchment and weights. Return crust to oven and continue to bake until bottom and sides are evenly golden brown all over, 20–25 minutes longer.

Spoon filling into crust and top with streusel, covering filling evenly. Bake until filling is bubbling up through streusel and streusel is golden, 50–60 minutes. Transfer pie pan to a wire rack and let pie cool in pan, at least 4 hours.
Do Ahead: Streusel can be made 1 week ahead; keep chilled, or freeze in an airtight container up to 1 month. Pie can be baked 1 day ahead; cover and chill.

peach-pie-the-old-fashioned-two-crust-wa.name: Peach Pie The Old Fashioned Two Crust Way
instructions: Line the bottom and sides of a 9-inch pie plate with one pie crust. Lightly brush crust with egg to prevent dough from becoming soggy later. Set second crust aside.
Place peaches in a large bowl, sprinkle with lemon juice, and mix gently. Mix together sugar, flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt in a separate bowl. Pour over peaches and mix until combined.
Pour into pie crust and dot with butter.

Cover filling with remaining pie crust. Flute the edges to seal or use a fork dipped in egg to press them down. Brush remaining egg on top, then cut several slits in the top crust to allow steam to escape.

Bake pie in the preheated oven for 10 minutes. Reduce the heat to 177°C (175 degrees C) and bake until crust is brown and juice begins to bubble through the vents, 30 to 35 more minutes. If the edges brown too fast, cover them with strips of aluminum foil about halfway through baking.
Cool pie for 15 minutes before slicing. Enjoy!

peaches-and-cream-squares.name: Peaches And Cream Squares
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Separate crescent dough into 2 long rectangles; press into an ungreased 9x13-inch baking pan to cover bottom of pan, sealing perforations.
Beat cream cheese, sugar, and almond extract in a bowl with an electric mixer until smooth; spread evenly over dough. Spoon peach pie filling evenly over top.
Combine flour, brown sugar, and margarine in a bowl until crumbly; sprinkle over peach filling. Top with almonds.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 25 to 30 minutes. Cool completely before cutting into squares.

peanut-butter-oat-energy-balls.name: Peanut Butter Oat Energy Balls
instructions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl and mix until thoroughly combined.
Chill in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
Use a spoon or tablespoon to evenly divide the mixture into 6 balls. Use your hands to form the ball.
Enjoy one now and save the rest for later by storing them in a sealed container in the refrigerator up to 1 week.
Enjoy!

pearl-onion-and-sweet-pepper-skillet.name: Pearl Onion And Sweet Pepper Skillet

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar

instructions: Cook one 14.4-oz. bag frozen pearl onions, thawed, 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces, 2 tsp. sugar, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton salt, and ½ cup water in a medium skillet over medium-high heat, shaking pan occasionally to toss onions, until liquid evaporates and onions are tender, 9–12 minutes. Transfer onions to a medium bowl.

Heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in same skillet. Add 3 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and cook, stirring constantly, until golden brown, about 30 seconds. Add one 1-lb. bag mini sweet peppers, thinly sliced, and season with kosher salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly softened and turning golden brown, about 4 minutes. Return onions to pan and toss to combine.

Add ¼ cup tomato paste and ¼ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes to pot and cook, stirring constantly, until vegetables are coated and paste is slightly darkened in color, about 2 minutes. Pour in 3 Tbsp. sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar and cook, scraping up any browned bits, 1 minute. Pour in 1½ cups water and cook, stirring to incorporate, until liquid is slightly reduced, about 1 minute.

Crack 4 large eggs into pan and cover skillet (a baking sheet works great if you don’t have a lid). Steam until whites are set but yolks are still runny, about 3 minutes. Uncover and season with freshly ground black pepper and flaky sea salt and sprinkle some chopped parsley over. Serve with toasted bread alongside for dipping.

pecan-cream-pie.name: Pecan Cream Pie

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Whisk 1⅔ cups (208 g) all-purpose flour, ¼ tsp. baking powder, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl. Add 2 oz. chilled cream cheese, cut into 1" pieces; rub into dry ingredients with your fingers until combined (mixture will be very shaggy). Add 10 Tbsp. chilled unsalted butter, sliced ½" thick, and toss to coat, then smash into smaller, flatter pieces (about chickpea size). Make a well in the center; pour in ¼ cup ice water. Toss with a fork or your hands to distribute, then knead dough in bowl a couple of times to bring together (some dry bits may remain).

Turn dough out onto a lightly dusted surface; dust top of dough with rice flour or all-purpose flour. Roll out to a ½"-thick rectangle. Fold in half, rotate 90°, and fold in half again. Roll out again to a ½"-thick rectangle and repeat folding process, dusting with more flour as needed. Pat into a ½"-thick disk; wrap in plastic. Chill at least 2 hours and, preferably, up to 12 hours.

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 425°. Let dough sit at room temperature 5 minutes. Unwrap and roll out on a lightly floured surface to a ¼"–⅛"-thick round. Wrap around rolling pin; transfer to a standard 9"-diameter pie dish (preferably metal). Unfurl into dish, then lift edges and allow dough to slump down into dish. Trim overhang to 1". Fold overhang under and crimp edges as desired. Prick bottom and sides of dough in several places with a fork. Freeze 15 minutes.

Crumple up 2 sheets of parchment paper; smooth out and place over dough. Fill dish with pie weights or dried beans. Set pan on a foil-lined baking sheet and bake crust on lower rack, tenting edges with foil if browning too quickly, until edges are golden brown and bottom is opaque, 35–40 minutes. Remove from oven; reduce oven temperature to 350°. Lift parchment and weights out of pan.
While the crust is baking, whisk 2 large eggs, ⅔ cup (packed; 133 g) dark brown sugar, and remaining 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl; set aside.

Melt remaining 6 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a small saucepan set over medium. Add 2½ cups (300 g) raw pecans and cook, stirring gently, until nuts are slightly darkened in color and fragrant, 5–7 minutes. Pour into a fine-mesh sieve set over a small bowl.

Transfer ½ cup butter-toasted pecans to another small bowl and add 1 Tbsp. reserved egg mixture; toss to coat. Spread glazed pecans on a parchment-lined baking sheet; bake on upper rack until dry to the touch and a honeycomb-like texture appears on surface, about 5 minutes. Let candied nuts cool.

Finely chop reserved remaining pecans. Add to remaining egg mixture along with 2 Tbsp. sour cream, 1 tsp. vanilla extract, and reserved brown butter; stir to combine. Scrape into crust and bake on lower rack until pecan layer is mostly set but still jiggles slightly in the center when gently shaken, 15–18 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack; let crust with pecan layer cool until barely warm, at least 30 minutes.
Do Ahead: Pecan topping can be candied 1 day ahead; store airtight at room temperature. Crust with pecan layer can be baked 1 day ahead; store, covered with foil, at room temperature.
Heat 1½ heavy cups cream and 1 cup whole milk in a medium saucepan over medium until steaming, about 2 minutes.

Meanwhile, whisk 6 large egg yolks, ¾ cup (packed; 150 g) dark brown sugar, ⅓ cup (40 g) cornstarch, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and remaining ½ cup whole milk in a medium bowl.

Gradually pour warm cream mixture into egg mixture, whisking constantly until combined. Pour mixture back into pan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it starts to bubble, then becomes glossy and thick (like pudding), 3–4 minutes. Scrape into a medium bowl, add 6 Tbsp. chilled unsalted butter, cut into pieces, and 4 tsp. vanilla extract, and whisk until butter is melted and custard is emulsified. Cover with plastic wrap, pressing directly onto surface. Let sit at room temperature until crust with gooey pecan layer is cool enough to touch without burning yourself (slightly warm is fine).
Uncover custard; whisk to break up any large lumps. Spoon over gooey pecan layer, spreading evenly to edges. Cover and chill at least 4 hours and up to 1 day.

Whisk ¼ cup sour cream, 3 Tbsp. powdered sugar, remaining 1 tsp. vanilla extract, a pinch of kosher salt, and remaining 1 cup heavy cream in a medium bowl to medium peaks. Spoon over custard and spread into an even layer. Break candied pecans into large pieces and scatter on top.
Do Ahead: Pie can be assembled 1 day ahead. Chill.

peking-duck-lettuce-cups.name: peking Duck' Lettuce Cups

ingredients.item: Whole butter or bibb lettuce leaves

instructions: Preheat the oven to 121°C (120 degrees C).
To prepare the duck: Place duck legs in a large bowl; drizzle with oil and sprinkle with salt, five-spice powder, and black pepper. Toss until evenly coated.

Sprinkle large green onion pieces into a baking dish large enough to hold duck legs in a single layer. Place duck legs, skin-side up, on top of green onions. Scatter garlic over duck. Place a piece of parchment paper directly on top of duck to help retain moisture. Cover the baking dish tightly with aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 3 hours. Turn off the oven, crack open the oven door, and let duck rest in the oven for 1 hour; do not uncover the dish during this time.

Remove the dish from the oven and let cool to room temperature. Baste duck with rendered fat in the dish. Place the parchment paper back over duck and re-wrap the dish in aluminum foil. Refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.
Make sauce: Mix together hoisin sauce, lemon juice, sesame oil, and hot sauce in a small bowl. Set aside.
Remove duck meat from bones; leave skin on. Cut meat into 1/2-inch cubes.

Remove 1 tablespoon rendered fat from the dish to a skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir 1/2 of the cubed meat in hot fat until pieces are brown and crispy, 4 to 5 minutes. Add remaining meat; cook and stir until duck is just heated through, about 1 minute more. Stir in 1 tablespoon chopped green onion.
Spoon duck mixture into lettuce leaves. Drizzle with sauce; garnish with cucumber, green onions, and sesame seeds.

persimmon-pudding-pie.name: Persimmon Pudding Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Spread melted butter evenly over the bottom of a baking dish.
Beat persimmon pulp and sugar together in a bowl; beat in eggs. Beat in buttermilk and baking soda.

Sift flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt together in a bowl. Gradually add flour mixture to persimmon mixture, stirring until well incorporated; stir in vanilla extract. Pour persimmon batter into prepared baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly golden and cooked through, about 1 hour.

philly-cheesesteak-philadelphias-most-po.name: Philly Cheesesteak, Philadelphia's Most Popular Sandwich
philly-cheesesteak-philadelphias-most-po.original_name: Philly Cheesesteak, el bocadillo más popular de Philadelphia

ingredients.item: 400 g de bistec de ternera tierno
2 barritas de pan estilo hoagie o bagette
200 g de queso provolone o cheddar

instructions: He starts by cutting his beef steak into thin strips. Then pits and cuts the onion into thin slices. Do the same with green pepper, making sure you remove seeds and stem.

Warm a large frying pan with medium-high heat and add the 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Once the oil's hot, add the steak strips. Cooking the strips till they're golden out but juicy inside. Add salt and pepper to suit to enhance flavors. Once made, remove the steak from the frying pan and reserve.
In the same frying pan, add the cuts of onion and green pepper. Cooking till tender and slightly caramelized. That will bring a sweet taste and crispy texture to the sandwich.

Once the vegetables are cooked, put the steaks back into the frying pan. Place provolone or American cheesebes on the mixture of meat, onion and pepper. Cover the frying pan with a cover to allow the cheese to melt onto the ingredients.

While the cheese melts, it's time to put up the sandwich. Open the bread bars in half and place generously the mixture of meat, cheese and vegetables inside. If you prefer, you can add condiments as garlic sauce, mayonnaise or ground black pepper.

pickled-bacon-lezzet.name: Pickled Bacon
instructions: 1. Decorate your invitation tables with the most delicious accompanyers of pleasant time.
2. Take a look at the gangs of rusts.
3. With grape vinegar, pour in a deep bowl of pepper and marinate the rusts you eat.
4. Eat parsleys with tomatoes you peel the peel.
5. Remove the vinegar of the rust you are sea and the serving plate.
6. Add tomatoes and parsleys on it and serve.

pickled-carrots.name: Pickled Carrots
instructions: Pack carrots into jar. Bring vinegar, sugar, salt, and ¾ cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan, stirring to dissolve sugar and salt. Pour brine over carrots, seal jar, and chill until cold.

pickled-mushrooms-lezzet.name: Pickled Mushrooms
instructions: 1. Wash the mushrooms in plenty of water.
2. Bake 3 tablespoons of vinegar in plenty of water you add.
3. Transfer carnations, black peppers and two bay leaves from a clean jar.
4. Place the mushrooms firmly on it.
5. Close over with bay leaf.
6. For the Salamura, heat vinegar, salt and water in a container up to 3/1 of the water to be transferred to the jar.
7. Make salt melt.
8. After cooling, transfer to the jar and close the cover tightly.
9. Your tour is ready to beat after a day.

pickled-oily-peppers-lezzet.name: Pickled Oily Peppers
instructions: 1. Carefully wash the peppers and tip by the handle; take the right blade with lightly scratched.
2. O esnada grape vinegar, olive oil, water and salt big in a pot and boil.
3. Add peppers and light-and-grayed garlic to boiling water.
4. Cook peppers for about 2-3 minutes.
5. Fill in the jar with the help of a whip.
6. 1. In the heat pickled water of peppers
7. Fill in the jar to stay 5 cm space.
8. Close the cover of the jar tightly and keep it in the refrigerator.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

pickled-onion-argiro.name: Pickled Onion
instructions: For sweet sour onion pickles we need red dry onions, salt, sugar, vinegar and water.
You can use sugar of your choice and any vinegar you prefer.
The recipe onion pickle is simple and is made with 4 ingredients. In 30 minutes it is ready and red for impressive serving. Its sweet sour taste accompanies almost all food.

pickled-umeboshi-beets.name: Pickled Umeboshi Beets

ingredients.item: Umeboshi vinegar or unseasoned rice vinegar

instructions: Preheat oven to 475°.
Wrap beets in foil; place on a rimmed baking sheet and roast until tender, 1–1¼ hours.
Unwrap; let cool slightly.
Remove skin, then cut beets into wedges.
Place in a small bowl, add umeboshi and vinegar, and toss to coat.

pies-n-thighs-biscuits.name: Pies-n-thighs Biscuits
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Pulse baking powder, salt, sugar, baking soda, and 5½ cups flour in a food processor. Add butter and pulse until the texture of coarse meal with a few pea-size pieces of butter remaining.
Transfer mixture to a large bowl. Mix in buttermilk with a fork, then gently knead just until a shaggy dough comes together.
Pat out dough on a lightly floured surface until 1¼” thick. Cut out biscuits with a 3” biscuit cutter, rerolling scraps once.
Place biscuits on a parchment-lined baking sheet and brush tops with egg. Bake until golden brown, 30–35 minutes.

pineapple-hibiscus-tequila-punch-cocktai.name: Pineapple-hibiscus Tequila Punch Cocktail
instructions: Bring sugar and 1 cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan and cook, stirring, until sugar dissolves, about 3 minutes. Add pineapple, reduce heat, and simmer 10 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit 30 minutes to infuse syrup with pineapple flavor. Strain into a small bowl; stir in vinegar. Cover and chill shrub until cold, about 30 minutes. Cover and chill pineapple pieces until ready to use.

Meanwhile, place hibiscus in a small bowl and pour 1 1/4 cups boiling water over. Cover and let steep 10 minutes. Strain tea into an airtight container; discard flowers. Cover tea and chill until cold, about 30 minutes.

Set aside 8 slices jalapeño and 8 pieces pineapple for serving. Stir mint, lime wheels, tequila, lime juice, remaining jalapeño and pineapple, 1 cup shrub, and 1 cup tea in a large pitcher and chill at least 1 hour.
Serve in ice-filled rocks glasses garnished with reserved jalapeño slices and pineapple pieces.
Cocktail can be mixed 6 hours ahead. Keep chilled.

pink-lemonade-argiro.name: Pink Lemonade

ingredients.item: 1 lemon cut into thin slices for serving
1 lemon cut into thin slices for serving

instructions: Place the sugar, strawberries and a cup of water in a pot over medium heat. Read all the secrets about fresh strawberries.
Mix to melt the sugar and press with the spoon to melt the strawberries for the pink lemonade.
Let it cool.
Pass the mixture of wheat thin, let the strawberry seeds go.
Combine the cold strawberry syrup, lemon and soda into a jug.
Fill the glasses with ice cubes and add the lemonade and lemon slices.
Ideal for a children's party, to cool your guests, even for baptism!
If you love lemonade, see my classic recipe for homemade lemonade concentrated, with many secrets and variations.

pistachio-and-dried-fruit-haroset.name: Pistachio And Dried Fruit Haroset

ingredients.item: Chopped dried cherries or dried cranberries

instructions: Stir pistachios in heavy medium skillet over medium heat until lightly toasted and fragrant, 4 to 5 minutes. Set aside to cool.
Combine dates, cherries, apricots, wine, and juice in medium bowl. Let stand 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. Mix in honey, lemon juice, orange peel, and spices. Chop pistachios; mix into haroseth.

Garnish haroset with mint sprigs.
Do Ahead: Haroseth without the mint can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Garnish with mint sprigs when ready to serve.

pistachio-sesame-cheese-ball.name: Pistachio-sesame Cheese Ball
instructions: Toast ¼ cup raw pistachios in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, about 4 minutes. Let cool, then finely chop.
Mix pistachios, 1 Tbsp. toasted sesame seeds, a few grinds of freshly ground black pepper, a pinch of crushed red pepper flakes, and a pinch of kosher salt on a plate or in a shallow bowl to combine.
Pat one 5.2-oz. package Boursin cheese into a ball and roll in pistachio mixture to coat. Transfer cheese ball to a platter and serve with crostini, crackers, or crudités.

pita-pizza-pockets-4-ways.name: Pita Pizza Pockets 4 Ways
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (180°C). Line 2 baking sheets with parchment paper.

Make the pepperoni pita pizza: Cut the pita in half crosswise to form 2 pockets and fill each pocket with 2 tablespoons of pizza sauce, ¼ cup (25 G) shredded mozzarella, and 6 pepperoni. Place on a prepared baking sheet.

Make the Hawaiian pita pizza: Cut the pita in half crosswise to form 2 pockets and fill each pocket with 2 tablespoons of pizza sauce, ¼ cup (25 G) shredded mozzarella, 2 tablespoons pineapple, and 2 tablespoons Canadian bacon. Place on a prepared baking sheet.

Make the veggie supreme pita pizza: Cut the pita in half crosswise to form 2 pockets and fill each pocket with 2 tablespoons of pizza sauce, ¼ cup (25 G) shredded mozzarella, 2 tablespoons mushrooms, 2 tablespoons green pepper, and 1 tablespoon olives. Place on a prepared baking sheet.

Make the BBQ chicken pita pizza: Cut the pita in half crosswise to form 2 pockets and fill each pocket with 2 tablespoons of barbeque sauce, ¼ cup (25 G) shredded mozzarella, 2 tablespoons diced chicken, and 1 tablespoon pickled jalapeños. Place on a prepared baking sheet.
Bake the pita pizzas for 10 minutes, until the cheese is melted.
Enjoy!

poached-salmon-in-the-microwave.name: Poached Salmon In The Microwave

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine butter, wine, lemon juice, dill, sugar, salt, and black pepper together in a microwave-safe casserole dish; place cover on dish.

Microwave butter mixture until butter is melted, 45 to 60 seconds. Add salmon, skin-side up, to butter mixture and place cover on dish. Microwave until salmon flakes easily with a fork, about 6 minutes.

poblano-rice-bagel-recipe-comedera.name: Poblano Rice Bagel, Recipe
poblano-rice-bagel-recipe-comedera.original_name: Rosca de arroz poblano, receta fácil

ingredients.item: 3  chiles poblanos asados sin piel (picados en cubo)

instructions: Add onion, garlic, cilantro, chicken cube and ½ cup of water to the blender. That's great.
En una olla a fuego medio, agrega el aceite y el arroz. Cocina el arroz hasta dorar, aproximadamente 5 minutos.
Incorporates the remaining water, cilantro and Saxony with salt to taste. Mix. Cover the pot and let them cook at low heat for 20 minutes or till the rice's ready. Once ready, get ready.
In a frying pan with medium heat heats oil and adds onion and previously roasted village chilies, with salt and pepper to taste. Meg and get cold. Then incorporates elote grains and mix well.
En un recipiente grande agrega el arroz y las verduras. Mezcla bien.
Luego, incorpora la crema agria y el queso mozzarella y mezcla nuevamente.
Con el molde previamente engrasado, agrega la mezcla de arroz y comprime para que no se rompa.
Hornea for 10 minutes at 177 been 3 been. Then leave to stand for 15 minutes and crumble onto a plate. Baits with more sour cream and decorates with pine and cilantro chili.

pop-pi.name: Pop Pi

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place bacon in a large skillet and cook over medium-high heat, turning occasionally, until crispy and evenly browned, about 10 minutes. Drain on paper towels and roughly chop.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Melt butter in small frying pan over medium heat. Add mushrooms and cook until tender and juicy, about 5 minutes.
Combine the bacon, mushrooms, spinach, cottage cheese, and Cheddar cheese in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper.

Press the edges of 2 crescent dough triangles together; roll out into a 6x5-inch rectangle. Place 1/4 of the spinach mixture on one end, leaving a 1/2-inch margin on the edges. Fold opposite end over filling, pressing down and crimping edges with a fork to seal. Repeat with remaining crescent dough and filling. Transfer to an ungreased cookie sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until lightly browned, 20 to 25 minutes.

pork-chile-verde-with-red-chile-salsa.name: Pork Chile Verde With Red Chile Salsa

ingredients.item: Diced roasted peeled seeded mild green chiles

instructions: Puree 2 cups chicken broth, 1/4 of tomatillos, green onions, cilantro with stems, and garlic in blender. Set salsa verde aside.

Brush heavy large pot with oil; heat over medium-high heat. Sprinkle pork with salt and pepper. Working in batches, add pork to pot; cook until browned, turning occasionally, about 4 minutes per batch. Using slotted spoon, transfer pork to bowl. Pour off all but 1 tablespoon fat from pot (add oil if needed). Add onion to pot; sauté until soft, about 5 minutes. Sprinkle cumin seeds over; cook until onion is golden and cumin is toasted, about 2 minutes. Add remaining tomatillos; cook until tender and browned in spots, stirring occasionally and reducing heat to medium if browning too quickly, about 8 minutes. Return pork and any juices to pot. Add 2 cups reserved salsa verde, 1 cup broth, chiles, and oregano. Cover; simmer over medium-low heat until pork is tender, about 2 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 3 days ahead. Cool slightly. Chill uncovered until cold, then cover and keep chilled. Bring to simmer before continuing.
Add potatoes to pork. Simmer until potatoes are tender, about 30 minutes. Stir in remaining salsa verde; bring to simmer. Thin with additional broth, if desired. Season with salt and pepper.
Divide chile verde among bowls. Top with cilantro and dollop of Red Chile Salsa.

pork-katsu-sandwich.name: Pork Katsu Sandwich

ingredients.prep: core removed, very thinly sliced (about 3 cups)
preferably Bull-Dog, and Dijon mustard (for serving)
a fermented seasoning made of rice koji, salt, and water, can be found at Japanese markets, in the Asian foods section of some supermarkets, and online.

instructions: Slice pork crosswise into 4 medallions. Place between 2 sheets of plastic wrap; gently pound with a meat mallet to 5"-wide pieces.
Whisk koji, salt, and 1 cup water in a medium bowl until salt dissolves. Add pork; cover and chill at least 8–24 hours.

Drain pork (no need to rinse off koji if it sticks); set aside. Place cabbage in a medium bowl. Finely grate lemon zest over; slice lemons in half and squeeze in the juice. Season cabbage with salt. Using your hands, toss and squeeze cabbage until slightly wilted, about 5 minutes. Chill until ready to use.

Place eggs, panko, and flour in 3 separate shallow bowls. Whisk 2 Tbsp. water into eggs. Line a rimmed baking sheet with paper towels and set a wire rack inside; place near stovetop. Working with 1 piece of reserved pork at a time, dredge in flour, shaking off excess. Dip in eggs, letting excess drip back into bowl, then coat in panko, pressing to adhere before shaking off excess. Transfer to another rimmed baking sheet or a platter.

Pour oil into a medium heavy pot to come 2" up sides. Heat oil over medium-high until an instant-read thermometer registers 350°–365°. Carefully lower a piece of pork vertically into skillet, letting it slide away from you into oil until it eventually lies flat. Cook, using tongs to keep meat submerged in oil, until golden brown underneath, about 1 minute. Using tongs, carefully turn over and cook until golden brown on the other side, about 1 minute. Transfer to prepared baking sheet; immediately season with salt. Repeat with remaining pieces of pork.
Drizzle tonkatsu sauce over cutlets. Spread mustard on 1 side of half of bread slices; top with cabbage mixture, then cutlet, sauce side up. Close sandwiches and slice each into thirds.

pork-tenderloin-diablo.name: Pork Tenderloin Diablo

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Season pork with salt and black pepper.

Heat oil in an ovenproof skillet over high heat. Add pork; cook until browned on one side, 3 to 4 minutes. Flip pork; transfer skillet to the preheated oven. Cook until pork browned and still slightly pink in center, 20 to 25 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 63°C (63 degrees C). Transfer pork to a plate.

Discard any excess oil from skillet. Place skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken broth; bring to a boil, scraping any browned bits off bottom of skillet. Whisk in cream, horseradish, Dijon mustard, and cayenne pepper; continue cooking until reduced to a thick sauce, 3 to 4 minutes. Off heat, whisk in cold butter, then stir in chives.
Slice pork into 1/2-inch slices; top with sauce.

portuguese-style-grouper-pasta-teleculin.name: Portuguese-style Grouper Pasta

ingredients.item: 1 small can tomato in pieces 390 g

instructions: Cook the fish in abundant water seasoned with salt, drain and reserve the water. After warm, clean the fish skin and pimples.

Light a pot with olive oil, let it warm, add the onion, garlic and cilantro, all chopped up, and let it saute, stirring from time to time. Then add the tomato pieces and the blond leaf, stir and let it boil for 3 minutes.
Add 1.5 l of the fish broth you have reserved (if necessary, perfect with more water), stir, retrieve the seasonings and let boil.
Acrescente a massa e deixe cozer, mexendo de vez em quando. Adicione o peixe, envolva, retire do lume e sirva decorado com folhas de coentros.

potato-and-cheese-pierogi.name: Potato And Cheese Pierogi

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground back pepper
Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt use half as much by volume or an equal amount by weight

instructions: For the Filling: In a medium skillet, melt 2 tablespoons (30g) butter over medium heat. Add onion, season with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring frequently, until softened, about 5 minutes. Continue to cook, stirring frequently and adding 1 to 2 tablespoons (15 to 30ml) of water at a time when onions begin to stick and threaten to scorch, until light golden-brown, about 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, in a large saucepan, combine potatoes, 2 quarts (1.9L) water, and 2 teaspoons (6g) salt. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat to maintain a simmer. Cook until potatoes are tender and offer little resistance when pierced with a paring knife, about 10 minutes. Drain potatoes, and return to now-empty saucepan. Set saucepan over low heat and cook, shaking constantly, until moisture has evaporated from potatoes, about 1 minute. Remove from heat.

Using a ricer or food mill, pass potatoes into a medium bowl. Using a flexible spatula, stir in remaining 3 tablespoons (45g) butter, and 1/2 cup (115g) of the reserved onion mixture; transfer remaining onion mixture to a small bowl for garnish. Season with salt and pepper to taste, and allow to cool for 5 minutes. Stir in farmer cheese until thoroughly combined, cover, and set aside if making the pierogi right away, or refrigerate filling for up to 2 days.

For the Dough: Whisk together flour and salt in the bowl of a stand mixer until thoroughly combined, at least 30 seconds. Add sour cream and egg, fit stand mixer with dough hook, and mix on medium-high speed until a smooth and elastic dough forms that pulls away from the sides of the bowl, 6 to 8 minutes. Cover, and set aside at room temperature for at least 30 minutes or wrap in plastic and refrigerate for up to 24 hours.

To Assemble and Finish: While dough is resting, portion the potato filling. Using a 1-tablespoon measuring spoon, scoop 1 heaping tablespoon (1 ounce; 30g) portions of potato mixture onto a rimmed baking sheet. Roll each portion between your palms to form a ball and set back on baking sheet. Line a second rimmed baking sheet with parchment, and dust lightly with flour; set aside.

Once dough is rested, turn out onto a lightly floured surface. Using a rolling pin, roll dough into a roughly 18-inch circle, about 1/8-inch thick. Using a 3-inch cookie cutter, punch out 24 rounds of dough. Place one portion of filling in the center of each round of dough. Working with one portion of dough at a time, fold dough over filling to form a half-moon while distributing filling to fit within it, firmly pinch edges to seal, and transfer to prepared baking sheet. Repeat with remaining portions. Uncooked pierogi can be covered and refrigerated for up to 24 hours.

In a pot of boiling salted water, cook half of the pierogi until dough is cooked through and filling is heated through, 3 to 5 minutes. Using a spider skimmer, transfer to a lightly greased baking sheet. Repeat with remaining pierogi. Boiled pierogi can be served as-is with reserved cooked onion and sour cream, or proceed to step 8 for pan-frying instructions.

In a large nonstick skillet, heat 1 tablespoon (15ml) vegetable oil and 1 tablespoon (15g) butter over medium-high heat until butter is foaming. Add enough pierogi to cover the bottom of the skillet in a single layer without crowding the pan, and cook, flipping occasionally, until crisp and golden brown on both sides, 3 to 5 minutes. Transfer to serving platter. Repeat with remaining pierogi, adding remaining oil and butter as needed. Serve, passing sour cream, reserved onion, and chives (if using) at the table.

potato-and-zucchini-salad.name: Potato And Zucchini Salad

ingredients.prep: with seeds, thinly sliced into rounds

ingredients.item: Summer squash (such as zucchini or yellow crookneck squash; about 1 lb.)

instructions: Place potatoes in a large pot; add cold water to cover by 2". Season with salt and bring to a boil. Cook until potatoes are just tender when pierced with a sharp knife but not mushy, 12–15 minutes. Drain; set aside.
Meanwhile, whisk egg yolk, vinegar, and Dijon mustard in a small bowl. Whisking constantly, slowly add ¼ cup oil, drop by drop, until well emulsified. Season to taste with salt and pepper; set aside.

In a large skillet, heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil over medium-high heat. Add shallot and chile and cook, stirring occasionally, until shallot is soft and fragrant, 3–4 minutes. Add squash and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender but not mushy, 5–6 minutes.
Combine potatoes, squash mixture, scallions, and basil in a large bowl. Drizzle with some Dijon dressing and toss to coat. Season with salt and pepper. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

practical-hand-rolled-pastry-lezzet.name: Practical Hand Rolled Pastry
instructions: 1. Crochet onions in the form of cube.
2. Sauce the olive oil until pink.
3. Cook it by adding jealousy, salt and pepper.
4. Add chopped parsley after January.
5. Flour, salt and juice dough kneading container and stir and knead.
6. Cover a damp cloth on the dough you prepared and rest for 2 hours.
7. Make the rested dough into a large cylinder on the countertop you have, and split into 8 equal parts.
8. Open the size of 15-20 cm with the help of each piece roller.
9. For the round tray you lubricated, the first four pips to the oil ends, and the index.
10. Restricted tribute or remaining softeners still take fat on their interval and index to the tray in a row.
11. 11. Bake the tray. leg in the crisp fire.
12. Reverse the bör with the help of a cover and also cook the other face.
12. August Serve after arrival.
14.  Afiyet olsun.
15. What are the Tricks of the Practical Hand-On-Scalding Recipe? If you want to have a consistency that will be scattered in the mouth, you can add a large amount of vinegar.
16. Start by making an internal harassment first.
17. September When dough is ready, the inner mortar will be cool.
18. If you want differently to prepare floors, you can make it roll by filling the dough with mortar.
19. September Then you can also give yellow and rose shape around it.
20. If you want to cook in the oven instead of the pan, adjust the heat of the oven to 180 degrees, and cook about 20 minutes.
21. 1 Portion Practical Hand Held Dove Done Calorie?A slice of practical hand-opening leg, prepared with peanut mortar, is about 250 calories.
22. Depending on the time you use, calorie value may vary.

practical-pastry-with-ayran-lezzet.name: Practical Pastry With Ayran
instructions: 1. melt and spark the butter in the pan.
2. Take the white of the egg.
3. Clean and off Maydanoz and dereot.
4. Pour white cheese.
5. Extract dough into kneading container.
6. Open the middle like the pool and add the carbon.
7. Add lemon juice on it (for the removal of carbonate).
8. Mix the butter, ayran, egg white, salt, whip pepper, thyme, white cheese, bake cheese, parsley, dereotu and moon beans.
9. Smooth dough knead until you get.
10. Cover the size of the tangerine from the dough.
11. 11. Roll the pieces you have prepared in your hands.
12. Oil the oven tray.
12. August Indexing the dough into the tray as intermittent.
14 July Remove the yolk of the egg and sprinkle the red pepper.
15. Cook for 25-30 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 180 degrees.
16. Take a warm service from the oven.

prepare-a-creamy-rigatoni-with-chicken-a.name: Prepare A Creamy Rigatoni With Chicken And Carrot Sauce
prepare-a-creamy-rigatoni-with-chicken-a.original_name: Prepara un cremoso rigatoni con pollo y salsa de zanahoria

ingredients.item: 200 ml  de crema de leche (puede sustituirse por crema vegetal)
Un toque de jengibre fresco rallado o ralladura de naranja (opcional)

instructions: Peel and cut carrots into small cuts to facilitate their cooking.
Cooking carrots in water with salt for 10 to 12 minutes until they are very soft.
Mientras tanto, cortar la pechuga de pollo en cubos medianos y sazonar con sal y pimienta.
In a large frying pan, heat up the olive oil and seal up the chicken till it's golden out. Reserve.
In the same frying pan, add the butter and sigh the onion finely minced with garlic until transparent.
Sorting the cooked carrots with the chicken stock up to a homogenous mixture.
Incorporate carrot cream into frying pan and cook with medium heat.
Add milk cream, nutmeg and tit salt and pepper.
Return chicken to frying pan and cook all together for 5 minutes to integrate flavors.
Cooking rigatoni in water with salt as instructed by the package until you are at dente.
Escurrir la pasta y mezclar directamente con la salsa.
Servir caliente con queso parmesano y perejil fresco.

prepare-pickled-sardines-comedera.name: Prepare Pickled Sardines

ingredients.item: 100 ml de vinagre de jerez o blanco
1/4 vaso de aceite de oliva (al gusto)

instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Clean up the sardines. Take back his scales and his viscers and cut his head. That's good.
Sazona las sardinas con sal y pimienta al gusto.
Put sardines in an oven plate and scuba them with some olive oil.
Hornea from 15 to 20 minutes or until soft.
Mientras, pela y filetea los dientes de ajo.
Warm a pan or frying pan with an olive oil glass room.
It incorporates garlic teeth, laurel leaves and thyme pits. Fry with slow fire to clear his smell for 7 minutes.
Fold vinegar and lemon juice and paparka. Mix very well and cook for another 5 minutes. Turn it off.
In a glass package, place baked sardines and baits with vinegar, olive oil and spices. Let rest for at least 30 minutes to impregnate the taste and ready.

prepare-roast-chicken-with-butter-and-he.name: Prepare Roast Chicken With Butter And Herbs
prepare-roast-chicken-with-butter-and-he.original_name: Prepara pollo asado a la mantequilla y hierbas
instructions: To purify your oven at 180 and 3.
En un recipiente agrega la mantequilla, el romero, sal al gusto y una cucharada de tomillo.
Mezcla muy bien hasta que se integren perfectamente.
Luego, forra una bandeja con papel aluminio y coloca encima el pollo. Une bien el pollo con la mezcla de mantequilla y las hierbas hasta que quede impregnado en toda la superficie.
Once all the chicken is covered with butter, peppermint and put lime cuts onto the chicken and a thyme branch into the cavity.
Mete al horno y hornea durante 1 hora y 15 minutos hasta que se cocine perfectamente.
Luego, en una fuente de vidrio coloca las papas y el camote. Agrega aceite de oliva y sazona con sal, pimienta y la cucharada de tomillo.
Mixing and baking for 30 minutes at 180 been 3 been.
Retiro from the oven, serve the chicken with the vegetables and chicas.
Enjoy!

prepare-some-onions-stuffed-with-roasted.name: Prepare Some Onions Stuffed With Roasted Vegetables
prepare-some-onions-stuffed-with-roasted.original_name: Prepara unas cebollas rellenas de verduras asadas

ingredients.item: 2 cdas de aceite de oliva (virgen extra)
50 gr de queso de cabra desmoronado  ((opcional))

instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 and 3.
Corta la parte superior de cada cebolla y con cuidado retira el centro, dejando una capa externa de aproximadamente 2-3 capas. Reserva el interior para el relleno.
Put empty onions onto a baking plate and scuba with some olive oil and a pint of salt.
Hornea durante 15 minutos hasta que comiencen a ablandarse.
Mientras tanto, pica finamente el centro de las cebollas retirado anteriormente.
In a big frying pan, heat up olive oil and spray garlic with minced onion till they become golden.
Add peppers, pumpkin, carrot and mushrooms. Cooking at medium heat for 8-10 minutes till well roasted.
Saxony with thyme, oregano, salt and pepper to taste.
Rellena cada cebolla con la mezcla de verduras asadas.
Espolvorea queso de cabra y almendras fileteadas por encima.
Baked for 10-12 more minutes, till cheese melts and almonds are slightly golden.
Retira del horno y decora con perejil fresco.

prepare-some-very-delicious-dark-chocola.name: Prepare Some Very Delicious Dark Chocolate Enmoladas!
prepare-some-very-delicious-dark-chocola.original_name: Prepara unas enmoladas de chocolate oscuro ¡muy deliciosas!

ingredients.item: 1  pechuga de pollo cocida y desmenuzada (aprox. 250 g)
1 cda pure cocoa powder without sugar
1 cda mani or almond butter (optional to give body)

instructions: Gather the dried chilies slightly into a hot frying pan for a few seconds to intensify their smell. Avoid burning them because they can bitter the salsa.
Colocar los chiles tostados en agua caliente durante 10 minutos hasta que se suavicen.
Roast tomato, onion and garlic into a frying pan or comal until they have golden spots.
Sorting the hydrated chilies with tomato, onion, garlic, cocoa, chocolate, ajonjoli, cinnamon, nail, chewed sugar and half a cup of chicken stock to get a thick sauce.
Warm up a frying pan with oil or butter and pour out the liquefied salsa. Cooking with medium heat for 10 minutes constantly stirring.
Agregar el resto del caldo y cocinar otros 5 minutos hasta que la salsa tenga consistencia sedosa.
Retitle salt and adjust sweetness or spicy as best.
Warm tortillas into a frying pan with a small amount of oil till they are flexible.
Rellenar cada tortilla con el pollo desmenuzado y doblarlas.
Gently bath tortillas with hot chocolate mole sauce.
Decorate with fresh cheese, cream and roasted ham.

primavera-spaghetti-squash.name: Primavera Spaghetti Squash
instructions: Preheat oven to 400ºF (200ºC).

With a sharp knife, slice the squash in half. If the squash is too tough, puncture in several places forming a dotted line around the squash. Microwave for 3-5 minutes to soften. Allow to cool before cutting in half.
Scoop out the seeds, brush with oil, and sprinkle with salt, and pepper. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until a fork can easily pierce the skin.
Meanwhile, in a pan combine oil, garlic, and onion over medium heat, and sautè until onions are translucent.
Add mushrooms and cook for 3 minutes. Add the broccoli, asparagus, squash, tomatoes, salt, and pepper and cook until almost cooked through.
Add the milk/ milk alternative until warmed through. Add the vegetarian Parmesan and mix until evenly spread throughout vegetables. Add the lemon juice and stir to combine.
Remove squash from the oven, with a fork pull at the edges to produce that stringy “spaghetti” quality.
In the pan combine “spaghetti” with vegetables. Return to the squash and top with Parmesan.
Enjoy!

probiotic-yogurt-lezzet.name: Probiotic Yogurt
instructions: 1. First put the milk in a pot and boil.
2. After boiling milk, it is cooled to 40 degrees at room temperature.
3. It is mixed with milk yeast from appropriate temperature.
4. Then it is mixed with the addition of boiled seeds according to your request.
5. The pot is wrapped with thick blankets such as quilt and blanket, and 8 hours are rested for yeast.
6. In winter, the duration of yeast can be longer.
7. After the yeast process, probiotic can be consumed with yogurt affinity.

puerto-rican-meatballs-recipe-comedera.name: Puerto Rican Meatballs Recipe

ingredients.item: 250 gr de carne molida de res
100 gr de carne molida de cerdo
1 cda de cilantro o culantro picado
1 cda de aceite vegetal o de achiote

instructions: En un bol, mezcla la carne de res y cerdo con el huevo, pan rallado, leche, ajo, cebolla, adobo, hierbas, sal y pimienta.
Amasa suavemente hasta integrar, sin sobretrabajar la carne.
It forms medium meatballs, the size of a big nut.
Warm up an extensive frying pan with some oil and slightly cover them across. Withdraw and reserve.
In the same frying pan, add the remaining oil and pour the frying with medium heat until fragrant.
It incorporates tomato sauce, broth, laurel, cumin, oregano, olives and capers.
Cook the salsa 5 minutes and return the meatballs to the frying pan.
Cover and cook with low heat until well cooked and slightly thick sauce.
Rectifica sal y deja reposar unos minutos antes de servir.

puff-pastry-salmon-salmon-wellington.name: Puff Pastry Salmon (salmon Wellington)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220°C).
In a pan over medium heat, melt butter. Add the garlic and onions, cooking until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the spinach, salt, and pepper, cooking until spinach is wilted, about 1 minute.
Add the breadcrumbs, cream cheese, parmesan, and dill, stirring until mixture is evenly combined. Remove from heat and set aside.
On a cutting board, smooth out the sheet of puff pastry. Place the salmon in the middle of the pastry and season both sides with salt and pepper.
Place several spoonfuls of the spinach mixture on top of the salmon, smoothing it out so that it does not spill over the sides.

Fold the edges of the puff pastry over the salmon and spinach, starting with the longer sides and then the shorter ends. Trim any excess pastry from the ends, then fold the ends on top. Flip the puff pastry-wrapped salmon over and transfer for a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the beaten egg on the top and sides of the pastry. Score the top of the pastry with a knife, cutting shallow diagonal lines to create a crosshatch pattern.
Brush the top again with the egg wash.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, until pastry is golden brown.
Slice, then serve!
Enjoy!

pull-apart-jewish-challah.name: Pull-apart Jewish Challah
instructions: Dissolve active dry yeast in warm water. Add 1 tsp sugar and stir, activating yeast - the yeast should foam. (This should take 5 to 10 minutes).
In a stand mixer, mix one egg, sugar, oil, and salt together. To this, add two cups of flour and mix.
Add activated yeast to flour and mix well. Then, add the remaining flour until dough forms and is kneadable.
On a clean surface, very lightly sprinkle flour and knead dough. Let stand on the counter for one hour and then punch down to deflate. Shape into a ball.
Next, place dough in a bowl and cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate overnight or for at least 10 hours.
The next day, preheat the oven to 177°C. Punch down dough and knead for an additional 5 minutes. Form into a ball and cut this into 3 equal pieces.
Roll out the pieces into strands and let rest for 5 minutes. Then, roll out a second time - strands should have become a little more elastic at this point.
Braid into a loose challah, being careful not to braid too tightly as the dough will rise again once down.
Now, allow dough to rise for another 30 minutes until doubled in size. To test, gently poke a finger into the dough - if it’s ready, this should leave a dent that slowly bounces back.

Once ready, whisk room temperature egg until homogenized to create an egg wash. Use a pastry brush to apply this onto the entire top of the challah. If desired, add sesame seeds at this step (optional).
Place challah on a baking sheet and bake for 30 minutes or until light golden brown.
Remove from the oven, let rest, and serve.
Enjoy!

pulled-mani-with-3-ingredients-argiro.name: Pulled Mani With 3 Ingredients
instructions: Mix flour, sugar and yeast in a bowl.
Dissolve the salt in the lukewarm water and add the olive oil.
Mix and add the mixture to the bowl with the solid ingredients and add some flour or lukewarm water.
Empty the dough on the counter and work with your hands until it becomes smooth and soft.
Transfer to oiled bowl and roll to oil the surface and cover.
Allow it to rest and swell for about an hour.
When it doubles in volume, we gently oil our hands and deflate it.
Cut small pieces 40 g and – with oily hands – make them around.
Pull the rubber dough gently and stretch to an oval thin sheet, 0.5 cm thick.

pumpkin-ginger-cupcakes.name: Pumpkin Ginger Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease 24 muffin cups or line with paper liners.
Whisk together flour, pudding mix, crystallized ginger, cinnamon, baking soda, ground ginger, allspice, cloves, and salt in a bowl; set aside.

Beat butter, white sugar, and brown sugar in a large bowl with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition; beat in pumpkin purée and vanilla with last egg. Stir in flour mixture, mixing until just combined. Divide batter between the prepared muffin cups.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden and the tops spring back when lightly pressed, about 20 minutes. Cool muffins in the pans for 10 minutes before removing to cool completely on a wire rack.

pumpkin-turkey-soup.name: Pumpkin Turkey Soup
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Sauté onion, bell peppers, jalapeño peppers, and garlic in hot oil until tender, about 10 minutes. Add turkey; cook and stir until crumbly and no longer pink, about 5 minutes.
Mix in chicken broth, pumpkin puree, 1 cup Cheddar cheese, tomato sauce, and tomato. Season with chili powder, garlic powder, onion powder, red pepper flakes, salt, black pepper, and cumin.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer until flavors combine, at least 20 minutes. Serve topped with remaining 1 cup Cheddar cheese and sour cream.
